name: Peter Paul Mounds Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the deep chocolate cake mix in a large sheet cake pan until done.
2. While the cake is baking, mix together milk, sugar, and marshmallows in a separate bowl. Heat this mixture until the marshmallows are melted. Remove from heat and stir in coconut.
3. Spread the melted marshmallow mixture over the slightly warm cake.
4. For the icing, cook the remaining ingredients (sugar, evaporated milk, and butter/oleo) until boiling. Turn off the heat and add chocolate chips. Stir until melted. Spread the icing evenly over the cake.
